frameworks.name: PAS — Problem, Agitation, Solution
frameworks.structure: Hook → Problem (what's broken) → Agitation (why it hurts) → Solution (what Virgil did) → CTA question
frameworks.when: Default framework. Works for most posts.

frameworks.name: Crisis Story
frameworks.structure: Hook (something broke) → The panic → The realization → The fix → The lesson → CTA
frameworks.when: When something went wrong and you learned from it.

frameworks.name: Scene Opener
frameworks.structure: Set the scene (visual, sensory) → What happened → What it means → Takeaway → CTA
frameworks.when: When you have a specific moment worth painting.
frameworks.example_post: AI just killed the production studio.

frameworks.name: Dialogue Drop
frameworks.structure: Quote from real person → Context → Problem they revealed → Insight → CTA
frameworks.when: When someone said something that captures a bigger truth.

frameworks.name: Kill Features Logic
frameworks.structure: What we added → Why it seemed right → Who tested it → What broke → What we killed → The rule → CTA
frameworks.when: When you removed something and it made the product better.
frameworks.example_post: We removed all the dropdown filters.

frameworks.name: Two-Part Validation
frameworks.structure: Hook → Two methods side by side → What you learn from each → Where the gold is → CTA
frameworks.when: When comparing approaches or sharing a research method.
frameworks.example_post: Why I love Reddit for validation.

frameworks.name: Monk Mode Formula
frameworks.structure: Hook → The team dynamics → What each person does → The framework → The list → Counter-argument → CTA
frameworks.when: When sharing how you work with your team.
frameworks.example_post: How I built with my buddies to win.

frameworks.name: Transformation Story
frameworks.structure: Hook (old way) → Pain of old way → Discovery moment → New way → Steps → Life now → CTA
frameworks.when: When you switched from old method to new and life improved.

frameworks.name: Industry Observation
frameworks.structure: Bold claim about industry → Evidence (what you've seen) → Why nobody talks about it → What it means → CTA
frameworks.when: When you've noticed a pattern that agency owners experience but don't discuss.
frameworks.example_post: The platform just made a job disappear.

frameworks.name: The Compression Beat
frameworks.structure: Complex topic → Crush to one sentence → Expand with one example → Lesson → CTA
frameworks.when: When you can boil something down to its essence. Virgil's favorite move.

frameworks.name: Action Plan
frameworks.structure: Hook (relatable problem) → Short rant → Steps (numbered, conversational) → Punchline → CTA
frameworks.when: When giving practical steps. Keep steps conversational, not instructional.
frameworks.example_post: Haven't you built an AI agent yet?

frameworks.name: Contrarian View
frameworks.structure: Common belief → Why everyone follows it → Why it's wrong → What Virgil does instead → Result → CTA
frameworks.when: When you disagree with conventional wisdom and have evidence.
frameworks.example_post: More options, more control. Right? Wrong.
